title: Bug when setting board defaults
excerpt: I’ve found an infuriating bug! When setting the item defaults on a board sometimes the popup dialog box shows the defaults from the previous board (ie I set defaults on Board A, switched to Board B and the default popup …

posts.author: tcmarimosa (Tom Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve found an infuriating bug! When setting the item defaults on a board sometimes the popup dialog box shows the defaults from the previous board (ie I set defaults on Board A, switched to Board B and the default popup shows the defaults from Board A). Closing and reopening the defaults popup solves the problem.
